title: Base Memecoin Screener
description: Live feed of new token launches on Base — subscribes to new Aerodrome/Uniswap pairs, shows real-time price candles and momentum for meme coin hunters.
useCase: Build a Base-specific token launch radar that shows new pairs created in the last 24h with live price candles and initial liquidity — catch early Base memecoins.

keyParams.minLiquidityUsd: Minimum initial liquidity in USD to include a new pair
